title: Going Coconuts for World Coconut Day!
story: People around the globe crack open coconuts and celebrate World Coconut Day every September 2! This tropical holiday honors the amazing coconut palm tree and its incredible fruit. Families enjoy fresh coconut water, bake coconut cookies, and share coconut recipes on social media. Restaurants serve special coconut dishes like curry, cake, and ice cream. Many people post photos of coconut treats with fun hashtags. Some communities organize coconut-cracking contests or coconut bowling games. It's the perfect day to appreciate this versatile fruit that gives us food, drink, and so much more!
activity_question: What do people often do with coconuts on World Coconut Day?
activity_choices: Crack them open and enjoy coconut treats
Use them as bowling balls only
activity_answer: Crack them open and enjoy coconut treats
bonus_fact: A coconut can float in ocean water for months and still grow into a palm tree!
